text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #3)

release/debug of which?

poudriere jail is 12-stable
the port isn't being built with special options, just the defaults.

The selection options are: ALSA, PULSEAUDIO and SNDIO. ALSA is selected (the default)

There are no debug option in the port thatq I can see and I'm not using debug options in poudriere
